raw_consumer_statement: Filed a dispute with XXXXXXXX XXXX  for a defective dishwasher. Case # XXXX in the amount of {$850.00} on XX/XX/year>. XXXX 's issued a credit but when company sent in proof of purchase, it added the charge back to my account. I am not disputing the purchase, but the fact that the dishwasher does not dry at all and I have repeatedly tried to work with company. They sent replacements which were damaged and I have returned them and provided proof of return to XXXX XXXX  The merchant has violated the terms and conditions of the sales agreement by first sending a defective dishwasher that does not perform basic functions and then again by sending damaged replacement.
